decks.notes: This deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Archon of Cruelty, then bringing them back into play using spells like Reanimate and Animate Dead. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with these high-impact creatures early in the game, taking advantage of the combo potential to set up powerful plays. It also includes disruptive elements like Thoughtseize and Cabal Therapy to disrupt the opponent's game plan and protect its own combo pieces. The deck thrives on speed and efficiency to establish control and finish the game quickly.

This deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly using cards like Gaea's Cradle and Green Sun's Zenith to bring out powerful threats like Craterhoof Behemoth and Atraxa, Grand Unifier. It also includes control elements like Thoughtseize and Endurance to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to generate a large amount of mana and overwhelm the opponent with big creatures while also having the ability to disrupt the opponent's strategy.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana using artifacts and lands like Ancient Tomb and Urza's Saga to play powerful blue creatures like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Pinnacle Emissary. These creatures are supported by various artifacts like Mishra's Bauble and Mox Opal to generate card advantage and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes support cards like Force of Will for protection and Sink into Stupor for disruption. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggression and control, utilizing a mix of artifacts and powerful blue spells.

The main concept of this Dragon Stompy deck revolves around quickly dropping powerful dragons onto the battlefield and disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Chalice of the Void and Blood Moon. By ramping up mana with cards like Ancient Tomb and City of Traitors, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures like Hexing Squelcher and Sundering Eruption. Additionally, cards like Fable of the Mirror-Breaker and The One Ring provide additional utility and power to the deck, creating a fast-paced and disruptive strategy that aims to close out games quickly.

This deck focuses on applying early pressure on the opponent while disrupting their game plan with counterspells and removal spells. The key strategy is to control the board and tempo of the game by efficiently dealing with threats and setting up powerful creatures like Murktide Regent and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares to quickly close out the game. By utilizing cards like Baleful Strix for card advantage and Wasteland for land disruption, the deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent to secure victory.

This deck aims to quickly assemble the Doomsday combo, using cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal to generate mana and cast Doomsday early in the game. Once Doomsday resolves, the player can stack their library with Thassa's Oracle at the top and win the game by immediately drawing and revealing the card. The deck also includes interaction spells like Force of Will and Thoughtseize to protect the combo and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and consistency to help find key pieces of the combo.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly ramp up with City of Traitors, Chrome Mox, and Ancient Tomb to play powerful aggressive creatures like Broadside Bombardiers and Hexing Squelcher. The deck utilizes cards like Fury and Sundering Eruption to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The inclusion of Chalice of the Void and Urza's Saga helps to further disrupt the opponent's plays. The deck also includes powerful finishers like The One Ring and Karn, the Great Creator to seal the victory. The overall strategy revolves around aggressive plays and disruption to overwhelm the opponent.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly get out big, powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Atraxa, Grand Unifier by using cards like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. These cards allow you to cheat them into play without having to pay their high mana costs. By using the combo pieces efficiently and protecting them with counter spells like Force of Will and Veil of Summer, you can overwhelm your opponent with huge threats and take control of the game.

This deck focuses on utilizing control elements, card draw, and ramp to outlast the opponent and maintain board advantage. By utilizing cards like Brainstorm, Leyline Binding, Swords to Plowshares, and Force of Will, the deck can disrupt the opponent's plans and answer threats efficiently. The inclusion of ramp cards like Up the Beanstalk and Quantum Riddler helps accelerate the deck's game plan, while Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage. The deck also includes a variety of lands to ensure consistent mana fixing. Ultimately, the deck aims to control the game and secure victory through resource management and strategic decision-making.

The main concept of this UWx Control deck is to maintain control of the game by utilizing a variety of removal spells, counterspells, and card draw to outvalue the opponent. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Swords to Plowshares, Force of Will, and Dress Down, while generating card advantage with Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Brainstorm. The deck also features threats like Murktide Regent and Thundertrap Trainer to close out the game efficiently. Overall, the deck excels at controlling the board and winning through incremental advantage.

The deck focuses on quickly putting powerful creatures, like Griselbrand and Atraxa, into play through reanimation spells such as Reanimate and Animate Dead. It also utilizes disruptive cards like Collective Brutality, Thoughtseize, and Unmask to protect the combo and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Show and Tell can be used to cheat in threats, while Underground Mortuary and Shallow Grave provide additional ways to bring creatures back from the graveyard. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast, powerful threats while disrupting their strategy.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by disruption with cards like Thoughtseize, Fatal Push, and Wasteland while also putting pressure on the opponent with efficient creatures like Murktide Regent and Orcish Bowmasters. Utilizing a mix of tempo and aggressive tactics, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while quickly closing out the game with powerful threats. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides additional card advantage and utility, while cards like Force of Will and Daze help protect your own game plan. The mana base is optimized for consistency and flexibility.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deploy powerful Eldrazi creatures onto the battlefield and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. The deck utilizes mana acceleration through cards like Simian Spirit Guide and Lotus Petal to cast high-cost Eldrazi creatures such as Reality Smasher and Thought-Knot Seer early in the game. Chalice of the Void is used to disrupt the opponent's game plan, while Cavern of Souls ensures the Eldrazi creatures are uncounterable. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Wasteland to control the opponent's mana base and maintain aggression.

The main focus of this Grixis Control deck is to disrupt and control the opponent's game plan while deploying threats of its own. With a mix of countermagic, removal spells, and disruptive creatures, the deck aims to control the board and outvalue the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares and Lórien Revealed provide additional card advantage and resilience. Through a combination of efficient removal, card draw, and threats, the deck aims to grind the opponent out in a long game while maintaining control of the battlefield.

The deck focuses on fast and aggressive plays with a mix of disrupting the opponent's strategy. It includes powerful creatures like Mutated Cultist and Overlord of the Balemurk to apply pressure, while also utilizing disruptive cards like Thoughtseize and Wasteland to control the game. The deck also has a combo finish with Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage to create a 20/20 Marit Lage token. Additionally, it has some ramp elements with cards like Mox Diamond and Gaea's Cradle to accelerate its game plan. Overall, the deck aims to quickly establish dominance and overwhelm the opponent.

The deck focuses on assembling the Painter's Servant and Grindstone combo to mill the opponent's entire deck. It utilizes cards like Goblin Engineer and Goblin Welder to tutor and recur combo pieces while also protecting the combo with counterspells like Pyroblast. The deck also includes various artifacts and red removal spells to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The goal is to quickly assemble the combo and win the game before the opponent can find an answer.
